steps.title: Identify both data sets from the plots
steps.content: Set A has mean $8\,\mu$F and range $12\,\mu$F (from the dot plot). Set B adds $17$ to each value.

steps.title: Compute the relevant statistic for each
steps.content: Adding a constant shifts the mean: $8+17=25$. The range is unchanged: $12$.

steps.title: Compare and conclude
steps.content: Set B: mean $25\,\mu$F, range $12\,\mu$F. That matches choice C — C is correct.
